name: @stoachain/ouronet-codex
description: Modular React Codex for the Ouronet ecosystem. Drop-in <CodexProvider> + hooks + headless components giving any React consumer (OuronetUI, AncientHoldings hub, future apps) full 1:1 Codex functionality — onboarding flows, CodexPrime account, account/key management, address book, encrypted backup/restore, Google Drive sync, per-account on-chain operations (rotate guard/payment/sovereign/governor). Peer-deps the @stoachain v4.2 atomic triplet (kadena-stoic-legacy + stoa-core + ouronet-core) for chain logic; owns its own internal state (Zustand) so consumers don't need Redux.
_peerDependenciesComment: @stoachain/dalos-crypto range is '>=4.0.0' (NOT >=4.3.0) on purpose: dalos-crypto tracks an independent v4.x line (current 4.0.3) separate from the kadena-stoic-legacy/stoa-core/ouronet-core 4.3 co-release triplet. A '>=4.3.0' pin would be unsatisfiable. Used directly by src/codex-identity/derivation.ts (Apollo curve key-gen). @noble/curves is pinned to 1.9.7 to match @stoachain/stoa-core's exact peer pin (single shared instance); used directly by src/state/store.ts for fresh ED25519 CodexGuard / Duo Pure Prime keypair generation.
